reviews.review_description: Game says start but won’t. Waste of money.

Everything I wanted Pistol Whip to be but I never knew to ask.
Very well optimized for me: 
1. You shoot things and they explode, great fun :) The explosion graphics literally have the word "boom" in them sometimes, yay :)
2. It's a workout, somehow. I finish levels here sweating, and my leg muscles are tight the next day, but it doesn't feel "hard" while playing, it feels like shooting things (and sometimes I have to duck away from enemies, but it.. feels secondary? probably not, I guess)

It's also really interesting that the game isn't "opinionated" about what kind of workout I do. I can walk from side to side, or squat, or something else. It's up to me and I kind of like it

The thing I'm not sure about is replayability. I finished the game, and repeating the same levels again seems less fun, but I am trying to get higher scores on them (not that I'm so sure how the scores are calculated?). But still, I'm not board, and this game is new, and everything else is great, so still 5 stars from me

reviews.review_title: Not Bad but Could be Better
reviews.review_description: I played the demo to the PC version a while back. It was cool. I was excited to see this game come to VR. So, I grabbed it. In hindsight the game isn't bad. But I found myself getting bored quickly by just standing still and shooting at the targets. Games like Pistol Whip, Against and even Beat Blaster are fun because you are constantly moving and the enemies are coming towards you. I think if Gun Jam added that component it would be a little less boring to me. But there's time and hope. The game just came out so I'm interested seeing where it goes to provide a bit more of a challenge.

reviews.review_title: Please add smoot loco and non arena lvls
reviews.review_description: The game is great, but is lacking smooth locomotion and non arena levels. Please provide both changes post release and it will be a 10/10 game.

This game is very fun and fantastic I love how u shoot to the beat and ur moving around trying not to get shot in real life and the stages gets hard as u progress I really had a good time playing this can y’all have a update to have more guns and more stages and have a update to move the song beat thing up so we can see when to shoot on point other than that I love it it’s a workout and shout out to the devs for making this game thanks guys 😀😀😀

reviews.review_title: Fun.  Looking forward to more content.
reviews.review_description: It's fun.  Good music good soundtrack.  A bit on the repetitive side. I'm looking forward to seeing what they do with this title whether it's progression or skills.
This gives pw a run for thier money I like that I can't shoot unless I'm on beat. Gives it a extra challenge. I'm impressed

I really like this game. I am impressed. It's a lot of arcade physical fun. Hats off to the devs 
...this is alot of fun

the game runs at 36 fps ( checked with OVR metrics ). the graphics are very simple and the arenas are small so there is no excuse for the atrocious performance the movement of the enemies and bullets is choppy which is unacceptable in a rhythm Game.

also only Your guns must be flred to the beat. the movements and attacks of the enemies aren't synched to the music as You would expect from rhythm based games such as necrodancer or bullets per minute.

not recommended

the game is meant to be a rhythm game, i get that. but there’s no reason for the slow fate of fire. i want to return this game so badly because of how much it refuses a faster paced play-through, even if you dual wield. 
stupid rate of fire, subpar songs
go and make some fire or suck my balls.

yours truly,
personinfrick

When you buy a game, wouldn't you expect new content, new updates, or visually stunning surroundings with fun gameplay when you think of a rhythm game. Well, that's not this game

I had hopes for this game only to be crushed 10 minutes in

There were no hard mechanics, no special and cool looking designs, and most of the songs sound bad

The gameplay style of shooting to a beat was not met with this game. Pistol Whip is a rhythm game that uses beats and guns correctly. This is a quick cash grab for the devs. And considering that i have not seen a single update for this game with such little content to start out with. I've had this game sometime around the spring of 2023. With not a single update, and even if there was one, there wasnt anything important with it

Never buy this game its a complete waste of money
Beat saber, Audica, Synth Riders, and Pistol whip, Ragnarock are good rhythm games, try those, not this garbage
This is a great game. Be ready to move
The music and rhythm is a shoot to the beat style. I had fun playing it and it is a ton of workout and exercise. I highly recommend

It's always going to be tough to follow in the footsteps of Pistol Whip, but Gun Jam VR is a superb alternative if you're looking for more of the same.

The enemies and guns are varied enough for this to feel different to Pistol Whip.

Not quite as polished as Pistol Whip, however it's very well presented, the guns feel great, and the music is very good. 

I love the weapons. Please provide a mode where you don't have to shoot to the beat and up the fire rate on the guns, as well as enabling the option to fire them at the same time.

Highly recommended!

This game is one of my favorite VR games! You should totally play it yourself! In addition, you can use the link below for 2５％ off. So go ahead and enjoy the game!

This is really fun to play!  The difficulty builds in a smooth way and the gameplay is addictive..I can see myself getting really stuck into it.

This game is exactly what I had hoped for since I first saw it in the Coming Soon section. The music is fantastic and works well. I like that you're able to hold 2 different guns at the same time for clearing out groups vs a single enemy. It looks and plays similarly to MotherGunship Forge, but with a focus on the music instead of the weapon creation. Also, the ability to use your surroundings to kill enemies gave me some old school Bulletstorm vibes. I'm having an absolute blast with this one and can't wait to play more!
A lot like Pistol Whip, which ain’t a bad thing. Just wish you didn’t HAVE to shoot to the beat. Otherwise the app is pretty dang good
It’s fun, the music is great but the “shooting on rhythm” is basically just shooting as a metronome, there is no half beats, off beats … it’s just a bit boring compared to Pistol Whip
First game I bought... and instant regret... am I even happy I bought the quest 3? Really hoping my next selection isn't a game that makes me wish I'd have used the money for toilet paper instead.
